name: Cobb Salad2
recipeInstructions:
1. Add just enough water to a skillet to cover the chicken. Bring to simmering.
2. Add the chicken. Cover; simmer until cooked through, 15 minutes. Let cool completely.
3. Tear the chicken into thin strips.
4. Prepare the dressing: Combine vinegar, mustard, shallots, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Whisk in olive oil in slow stream until well blended. Stir in cheese; set aside.
5. To serve, arrange greens on a platter with chicken, tomatoes, and avocado. Top with bacon. Drizzle with dressing immediately.
